description: The Pietraperzia Mafia family is a crime family of the Sicilian Cosa Nostra based in Pietraperzia, a town in the province of Enna. It has deep historical roots dating back to at least 1900 and reemerged in the 1980s after a period of inactivity. The family is a close ally of the powerful Catania Mafia family and was involved in high-level mafia operations, including preparatory meetings for the 1992 Capaci bombing. It is currently active.
